title: heteropappus ciliosus
intro: Heteropappus ciliosus, also known as the Chinese silverbur, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heteropappus ciliosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Heteropappus ciliosus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
